etymology.description: 言(言) (yán, "speech") + 𠯑(𠯑) (ph) = composed of word speech + phonetic sound
etymology.interpretation: The character 話(話) (huà, "speech; language") combines 言(言) (yán, "speech") as the semantic component with 𠯑(𠯑) (ph) as the phonetic component to convey the concept of communication or spoken language.
etymology.simplification: 话(話) replaces 言(言) (yán, "speech") with 讠, reducing the stroke count while maintaining the semantic meaning.

examples.chinese: 他说的话让我很感动(他說的話讓我很感動)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shuō de huà ràng wǒ hěn gǎndòng.

examples.chinese: 语言是交流的工具(語言是交流的工具)。
examples.english: Language is a tool for communication.

examples.chinese: 我听不懂他的方言(我聽不懂他的方言)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ tīng bù dǒng tā de fāngyán.
